'''鈭歮-ng-z-th''' ('''kamangzethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lock|lock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lock|lock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-ng-z-th
|-
! Lemma
| kamangzethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimangzethoko|thimangzethoko]] || [[word:jimangzethoko|jimangzethoko]] || [[word:shimangzethoko|shimangzethoko]] || [[word:kimangzethoko|kimangzethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
